name: Americas Gold and Silver Corporation
description: Americas Gold and Silver Corporation is a growing precious metals mining company focused on the production of silver, copper, and antimony from high-grade operations in North America. Headquartered in Toronto, Canada, the company owns and operates the Galena Complex in Idaho, USA, and the Cosalá Operations in Sinaloa, Mexico. With a strategic focus on scaling production at its cornerstone U.S. silver assets and developing its antimony processing capabilities, the company aims to establish itself as a leading North American silver and key domestic antimony producer.
